overview.description: The ProShares Ultra MSCI Emerging Markets (EET) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI Emerging Markets index. The fund provides 2x exposure to an index covering 85% of the market cap within emerging-market countries. EET was launched on Jun 4, 2009 and is issued by ProShares.
